# Knowledge Context Protocol (KCP)

> A structured metadata standard that makes knowledge navigable by AI agents.
> KCP is to knowledge what MCP is to tools.

KCP defines how to add a `knowledge.yaml` manifest to any project or documentation site
so AI agents can navigate it efficiently — without exploring by trial and error.

Where llms.txt gives agents a flat list, KCP gives agents a map: intents, dependency
chains, audience targeting, freshness dating, and selective loading — all in one YAML file.

Validated benchmark: 53–80% fewer agent tool calls vs unguided exploration (5 frameworks).

## Full Agent Navigation (KCP)

This repository ships its own knowledge.yaml manifest:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cantara/knowledge-context-protocol/main/knowledge.yaml

To use it: fetch the manifest → parse YAML → match your query against each unit's `triggers`
(keyword list) and `intent` (natural language) → fetch the `path` of the best match.
Use `relationships` to navigate related content (types: enables, context, depends_on, supersedes, contradicts, governs).

Example: "How do I validate a knowledge.yaml file?" → trigger `validation, schema` → unit `json-schema` → fetch schema/knowledge-schema.json

## Key Files

- /SPEC.md — Normative specification: all fields, validation rules, conformance levels
- /PROPOSAL.md — Why KCP exists and what problem it solves
- /README.md — Overview, comparison with llms.txt and MCP, getting started
- /guides/adopting-kcp-in-existing-projects.md — How to add KCP to your project in under 30 minutes
- /examples/README.md — Example manifests at four adoption levels plus simulation scenarios (A2A+KCP, energy metering, legal delegation, financial AML)
- /RFC-0001-KCP-Extended.md — Extensions: payments, compliance, federation, context hints
- /docs/ecosystem/webmcp-comparison.md — WebMCP vs KCP: Google+Microsoft browser-action standard vs KCP knowledge layer (complementary, not competing)

## How KCP Relates to llms.txt and MCP

- **llms.txt** (Jeremy Howard): flat index of URLs. Useful for small sites. KCP extends this.
- **MCP** (Anthropic): connects agents to tools. KCP structures the knowledge those tools serve.
- They compose: a project can have llms.txt for broad compatibility, knowledge.yaml for agents that understand structure.

## Real-World Adopters

- wiki.totto.org — personal knowledge wiki (KCP v0.9, 83 posts indexed)
- wiki.cantara.no — Cantara open source community wiki (KCP v0.9)
- crewAI, microsoft/autogen, huggingface/smolagents, anomalyco/opencode — KCP manifests submitted (PRs open, March 2026)
